name: agent-skills
description: A curated collection of AI agent skills for software development workflows. Includes the autodev environment bootstrapper and the Dependabot bump PR reviewer.

plugins.name: autodev
plugins.description: Interactively initialize a repository's AI agent development environment: steering documents, workflow skills, and structure documentation.

plugins.name: merge-dependabot-bump-pr
plugins.description: Review and merge Dependabot version bump PRs with 4-point safety checks (release age, critical bugs, breaking changes, source diff).

plugins.name: agent-coach
plugins.description: A bundle of focused transcript-analysis skills for Claude Code: each skill targets a single failure mode (context rot, token hot spots, rework & violations, missed skill triggers, Bash allowlist recommendations).
